ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "asin" TEXT /* Amazon Standard Identification Number (ASIN) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary category */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Stock quantity of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was last updated */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "reviewerID" TEXT /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "reviewText" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the review */,
  "overall" INTEGER /* Overall rating of the review (1-5) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of helpful votes */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of unhelpful votes */,
  "reviewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_email" TEXT /* Email of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_location" TEXT /* Location of the reviewer */,
  "reviewer_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the reviewer (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being sold */,
  "salesRank" INTEGER /* Sales rank of the product */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from the sale */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied during the sale */,
  "timeFormat" TEXT /* Time format of the sales data */,
  "month_year" TEXT /* Month and year of the sales data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sales record was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment record */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being analyzed */,
  "sentiment" INTEGER /* Sentiment score of the review (positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "helpfulRatio" REAL /* Helpful ratio of the review */,
  "sentiment_text" TEXT /* Sentiment text (e.g., 'positive', 'negative', 'neutral') */,
  "sentiment_confidence" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the sentiment record was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "related_products" (
  "related_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each related product record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "related_asin" TEXT /* ASIN of the related product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("related_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_related_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the brand was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the brand was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_brands" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., product manager, sales analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the product */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access log was added */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
